translations.es: Me gusta la frescura de la mañana.
translations.it: Mi piace la freschezza del mattino.
translations.vi: Tôi thích sự tươi mát của buổi sáng.
translations.nl: Ik hou van de frisheid van de ochtend.
translations.hi: मुझे सुबह की ताज़गी पसंद है.
translations.da: Jeg kan godt lide friskheden om morgenen.
translations.ja: 朝の爽やかさが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun elided before a vowel-initial verb; marks 1st person singular subject.
Main verb in present indicative (1st person singular); transitive, selecting the direct object 'la fraîcheur'.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces the noun 'fraîcheur'.
Common noun, feminine; denotes coolness/freshness and serves as the direct object of 'aime'.
Preposition contracted with the article ('de' + 'le'); introduces the genitive complement 'matin'.
Common noun, masculine; complement of 'fraîcheur' via 'du'.

sentences.target: Cette salade a une fraîcheur incroyable.

translations.fr: Cette salade a une fraîcheur incroyable.
translations.es: Esta ensalada tiene una frescura increíble.
translations.de: Dieser Salat hat eine unglaubliche Frische.
translations.it: Questa insalata ha una freschezza incredibile.
translations.zh-Hans: 这份沙拉新鲜得令人惊叹。
translations.yue: 呢碟沙律新鮮到不得了。
translations.pt: Esta salada tem um frescor incrível.
translations.tr: Bu salata inanılmaz bir tazeliğe sahip.
translations.vi: Món salad này có độ tươi mát đáng kinh ngạc.
translations.nl: Deze salade heeft een ongelooflijke versheid.
translations.hu: Ennek a salátának hihetetlen frissessége van.
translations.hi: इस सलाद में अविश्वसनीय ताज़गी है.
translations.el: Αυτή η σαλάτα έχει απίστευτη φρεσκάδα.
translations.nb: Denne salaten har en utrolig friskhet.
translations.id: Salad ini punya kesegaran yang luar biasa.
translations.sv: Den här salladen har en otrolig fräschör.
translations.ro: Această salată are o prospețime incredibilă.
translations.da: Denne salat har en utrolig friskhed.
translations.ja: このサラダは驚くほど新鮮です。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; points to a specific noun 'salade'.
Common noun, feminine; head of the noun phrase serving as subject.
Lexical verb in present indicative (3rd person singular); expresses possession.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces the direct object 'fraîcheur'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'a'.
Adjective (invariable in gender), postnominal modifier intensifying 'fraîcheur'.

sentences.target: On cherche la fraîcheur au rayon frais.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ʃɛʁʃ la fʁɛʃœʁ o ʁɛjɔ̃ fʁɛ/

translations.fr: On cherche la fraîcheur au rayon frais.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ʃɛʁʃ la fʁɛʃœʁ o ʁɛjɔ̃ fʁɛ/
translations.en: We’re looking for freshness in the refrigerated section.
translations.es: Buscamos la frescura en la sección de refrigerados.
translations.de: Wir suchen die Frische in der Kühlabteilung.
translations.it: Cerchiamo la freschezza nel reparto dei freschi.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在冷藏区寻找新鲜。
translations.ru: Мы ищем свежесть в холодильном отделе.
translations.pt: Procuramos frescor na seção de refrigerados.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi tìm sự tươi mát ở quầy thực phẩm lạnh.
translations.ar: نبحث عن النضارة في قسم المبردات.
translations.nl: We zoeken naar versheid in de koelafdeling.
translations.uk: Ми шукаємо свіжість у холодильному відділі.
translations.hu: A hűtött áruk részlegén keressük a frissességet.
translations.hi: हम ताज़गी के लिए रेफ्रिजरेटेड सेक्शन में ढूँढ रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ψάχνουμε τη φρεσκάδα στο τμήμα ψυγείων.
translations.nb: Vi leter etter friskhet i kjøleavdelingen.
translations.id: Kami mencari kesegaran di bagian berpendingin.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter friskhet i kylavdelningen.
translations.ro: Căutăm prospețime la raionul de produse refrigerate.
translations.cs: Hledáme svěžest v oddělení chlazených výrobků.
translations.da: Vi leder efter friskhed i køleafdelingen.
translations.ja: 冷蔵コーナーで新鮮さを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun; commonly used for 'we' in spoken French.
Main verb in present indicative (3rd person singular); transitive, taking 'la fraîcheur' as object.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces 'fraîcheur'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'cherche'.
Contraction of 'à' + 'le'; preposition introducing the locative complement 'rayon frais'.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'au' (store department/aisle).
Adjective, masculine singular; postnominal modifier of 'rayon' (chilled/fresh goods).

sentences.target: Cette brise apporte une fraîcheur bienvenue.

translations.fr: Cette brise apporte une fraîcheur bienvenue.
translations.en: This breeze brings a welcome coolness.
translations.es: Esta brisa aporta un frescor bienvenido.
translations.de: Diese Brise bringt eine willkommene Frische.
translations.it: Questa brezza porta una freschezza gradita.
translations.zh-Hans: 这阵微风带来令人舒爽的凉意。
translations.yue: 呢陣微風帶嚟一陣宜人的涼意。
translations.pt: Esta brisa traz um frescor bem-vindo.
translations.tr: Bu esinti hoş bir serinlik getiriyor.
translations.vi: Cơn gió này mang đến sự mát mẻ thật dễ chịu.
translations.nl: Deze bries brengt een welkome koelte.
translations.hu: Ez a szellő üdvözlendő hűvösséget hoz.
translations.hi: यह हवा स्वागतयोग्य ठंडक लाती है.
translations.pl: Ten wiaterek przynosi mile widziany chłód.
translations.el: Αυτό το αεράκι φέρνει μια ευπρόσδεκτη δροσιά.
translations.nb: Denne brisen bringer en velkommen kjølighet.
translations.id: Semilir angin ini membawa kesejukan yang menyenangkan.
translations.sv: Denna bris för med sig en välkommen svalka.
translations.ro: Această briză aduce o răcoare binevenită.
translations.da: Denne brise bringer en velkommen kølighed.
translations.ja: このそよ風は心地よい涼しさを運んでくる。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies 'brise'.
Common noun, feminine; subject of 'apporte'.
Main verb in present indicative (3rd person singular); takes 'une fraîcheur bienvenue' as direct object.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces 'fraîcheur'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'apporte'.
Adjective, feminine singular; postnominal modifier agreeing with 'fraîcheur' (meaning 'welcome').
